raw_title: News Characteristics, Newsworthiness and Secondary Gatekeeping in Brazil: Influences of Right-Wing Authoritarianism
title_en: News Characteristics, Newsworthiness and Secondary Gatekeeping in Brazil: Influences of Right-Wing Authoritarianism
title_zh: 巴西新闻特征、新闻价值与次级把关：右翼威权主义的影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了在巴西，右翼威权主义如何影响新闻的特征、新闻价值判断以及新闻传播过程中的次级把关行为。它关注政治意识形态如何塑造新闻选择和传播。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how right-wing authoritarianism influences news characteristics, judgments of newsworthiness, and secondary gatekeeping in Brazil. It focuses on how political ideology shapes news selection and dissemination.
research_direction_zh: 研究探索政治意识形态（特别是右翼威权主义）对新闻生产和传播过程的影响，特别是在巴西这样的民主国家中，如何影响媒体把关和新闻价值判断。
research_direction_en: The research explores how political ideologies, particularly right-wing authoritarianism, affect news production and dissemination processes, especially in democratic contexts like Brazil, influencing media gatekeeping and news value judgments.
